_doc: Front-end display configuration for the PHM monitor dashboard. Every value here was previously hard-coded in monitor.js / monitor.css. The Django context processor injects this as window.THEME on page load (synchronous, no fetch delay). monitor.js reads from THEME with built-in fallbacks so the page still renders if injection fails.

colors._doc: Canvas colour palette (Canvas cannot use CSS var(), so these hex values are injected into both the JS C object and the :root CSS variables to stay in sync).

thresholds._doc: Score/health colour boundaries. anomalyScoreRed aligns with ANOMALY_THRESHOLD(0.5) in system_config.json. healthRed/healthYellow are in [0,1] since v1.0 (health formula is 1 - abnormal/total).

poll._doc: Polling intervals (ms). chart follows the space-segment cadence; rul is slow (degradation is cycle-scale).

chart._doc: Telemetry chart sizing. cacheCount is the prefetch window (4x the viewport); viewCount is the visible slice.

display.systemTitle: 空间站有效载荷预测性维护支持系统

layout._doc: Panel geometry (px / flex). Synced with CSS variables in monitor.css. M2 rewrites to 4-zone layout (header + carousel + main[left|center|right]).

chart412._doc: M2 center-chart internal 4:1:2 sub-region height ratios (telemetry : anomaly-score : all-channel-alert-scatter). gapWidthPx is the folded width of a real backend gap. predOnlyMinPoints is the minimum consecutive pred-only points to mark 'data not arrived' rectangles.

carousel._doc: M4 channel-carousel behaviour. intervalMs switches channels automatically; manualInteractionPauseMs pauses the carousel after any user click (device tree / alert list / chart).
